description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: test, build, and deploy. Add a test job that runs the command `echo "Lanzando tests..."` in the test stage. Add a build job in the build stage that runs `echo "Build..."`. Add a deploy_staging job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch, executes `echo "Deploy a staging..."`, and sets the environment name to staging with URL https://staging.escuela.it. Add a deploy_prod job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch, is manual, executes `echo "Deploy a producción..."`, and sets the environment name to production with URL https://escuelta.it.
